title: Prediction: Buying Archer Aviation (ACHR) Stock Today Could Set You Up for Life
text: Archer Aviation (ACHR) currently trades around $6 per share, down from its $9.90 IPO price in September 2021. The company has a market capitalization of $4.85 billion despite minimal revenue generation. The eVTOL manufacturer faces significant hurdles with only two aircraft produced versus original targets of ten in 2024 and 250 in 2025. In 2025, the company generated less than $1 million in revenue but posted a net loss of $618 million. Despite current struggles, the article outlines substantial upside potential as Archer maintains a $6 billion indicative backlog with pending orders for roughly 1,200 aircraft as of end-2025. The broader eVTOL market is expected to expand at a 23.5% compound annual growth rate through 2034. Analysts project revenue could reach $482 million by 2028. If growth continues at 20% annually through 2036 and the company trades at 20 times sales, market capitalization could theoretically reach $42 billion representing substantial returns. Notably, the Motley Fool's Stock Advisor team did not include Archer among their ten best stocks despite the bullish long-term thesis, suggesting caution regarding near-term execution risks.
